response:
Subject: Farewell and Thanks

Dear Team,

As I prepare to move on to new adventures, I want to express my heartfelt gratitude for the incredible support and camaraderie we've shared over the years. Working alongside each of you has been a true highlight of my career, filled with laughter, challenges, and countless successes. I'll cherish the memories of our team meetings, late-night brainstorming sessions, and the way we've grown together. Please keep in touch—my personal email is [your email], and I'd love to hear about your future endeavors. Wishing you all continued prosperity and joy in everything you do.

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
